page_content:
CMLT - Comparative Literature

CMLT469 The Continental Novel (3 Credits) The novel in translation from Stendhal through the existentialists, selected from literatures of France, Germany, Italy, Russia, and Spain.

CMLT479 Major Contemporary Authors (3 Credits)

CMLT488 Genres (3 Credits)

A study of a recognized literary form, such as tragedy, film, satire, literary criticism, comedy, tragicomedy, etc.

Repeatable to: 6 credits if content differs.

2025-2026 [updated 2025.04.17]
